attributes.description: Insider-threat-focused view of Windows Event Logs (EVTX) parsed by EvtxECmd (Eric Zimmerman) via KAPE. Filters the firehose down to the 5 categories that matter most for IT investigations: authentication & account changes, PowerShell execution, process execution (Sysmon 1 + 4688), persistence mechanisms (service installs + scheduled tasks + WMI subs), plus the unfiltered baseline timeline. Pivots to the Registry, Prefetch, and Shellbags dashboards for full cross-artifact corroboration.

attributes.title: KAPE - Event Log
